svg.title: Token hierarchy — three levels, three brands
svg.desc: A single brand mode switch feeds three levels of design tokens across Brand A (orange, Roboto), Brand B (green, Roboto, NL variant), and Brand C (blue, Satoshi), producing a complete brand switch in one toggle.
svg.text: Base tokens — full colour palettes, 50–950 stops per ramp
Semantic tokens — role-based references into base layer
Component tokens — per-state variables referencing semantic layer

g.text: colours · typography · component variants · logo · form fields
